---
title: "NBA Total Points Prediction: Data Cleaning"
author: "Maya Lennon"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(slider)
library(tidyr)
```


## Load Raw Data

```{r}
games      <- read_csv("Games.csv",          show_col_types = FALSE)
team_stats <- read_csv("TeamStatistics.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
```


## Clean and Filter Games


```{r clean-games}
games_base <- games |>
  filter(gameType %in% c("Regular Season", "Playoffs")) |>
  mutate(
    game_datetime = ymd_hms(gameDateTimeEst),
    game_date     = as_date(game_datetime),
    home_team     = str_squish(hometeamName),
    away_team     = str_squish(awayteamName),
    total         = homeScore + awayScore,
    spread        = homeScore - awayScore
  ) |>
  select(
    gameId, game_datetime, game_date,
    home_team, away_team,
    homeScore, awayScore,
    total, spread, gameType
  )

cat("Rows in games_base:", nrow(games_base), "\n")
```

## Clean TeamStatistics into Team-Game Rows
```{r}
team_games <- team_stats |>
  filter(gameId %in% games_base$gameId) |>
  mutate(
    game_datetime = ymd_hms(gameDateTimeEst),
    game_date     = as_date(game_datetime),
    team          = str_squish(teamName),
    opponent      = str_squish(opponentTeamName),
    home          = as.integer(home),

    team_points   = teamScore,
    opp_points    = opponentScore,
    game_total    = teamScore + opponentScore,

    oreb          = reboundsOffensive,
    dreb          = reboundsDefensive,
    treb          = reboundsTotal,

    fga           = fieldGoalsAttempted,
    fgm           = fieldGoalsMade,
    fg_pct        = fieldGoalsPercentage,

    x3pa          = threePointersAttempted,
    x3pm          = threePointersMade,
    x3p_pct       = threePointersPercentage,

    fta           = freeThrowsAttempted,
    ftm           = freeThrowsMade,
    ft_pct        = freeThrowsPercentage,

    tov           = turnovers,
    ast           = assists,
    stl           = steals,
    blk           = blocks,
    pf            = foulsPersonal,

    second_chance_pts = pointsSecondChance,
    paint_pts         = pointsInThePaint,
    fastbreak_pts     = pointsFastBreak,
    turnover_pts      = pointsFromTurnovers,

    q1_pts        = q1Points,
    q2_pts        = q2Points,
    q3_pts        = q3Points,
    q4_pts        = q4Points,
    bench_pts     = benchPoints,

    season_wins   = seasonWins,
    season_losses = seasonLosses,
    plus_minus    = plusMinusPoints
  ) |>
  arrange(teamId, game_datetime, gameId)

cat("Rows in team_games:", nrow(team_games), "\n")
```

## Compute OREB Total
```{r}
true_oreb <- team_games |>
  select(gameId, home, oreb) |>
  mutate(side = if_else(home == 1, "home", "away")) |>
  select(-home) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = side, values_from = oreb) |>
  mutate(oreb = home + away) |>
  select(gameId, oreb)
```


## Compute Rolling Pregame Team Features

```{r}
team_features <- team_games |>
  group_by(teamId) |>
  arrange(game_datetime, .by_group = TRUE) |>
  mutate(
    prev_game_date  = lag(game_date),
    rest_days_raw   = as.numeric(game_date - prev_game_date) - 1,
    rest_days       = case_when(
      is.na(rest_days_raw) ~ NA_real_,
      rest_days_raw < 0    ~ NA_real_,
      TRUE                 ~ rest_days_raw
    ),
    back_to_back    = if_else(!is.na(rest_days) & rest_days == 0, 1L, 0L),

    games_played        = lag(season_wins + season_losses),
    rolling_win_pct     = lag(season_wins) / games_played,

    last1_pts          = lag(team_points),
    last1_pts_allowed  = lag(opp_points),
    last1_total        = lag(game_total),
    last1_oreb         = lag(oreb),

    last3_pts          = lag(slide_dbl(team_points,  mean, .before = 2, .complete = TRUE)),
    last3_pts_allowed  = lag(slide_dbl(opp_points,   mean, .before = 2, .complete = TRUE)),
    last3_total        = lag(slide_dbl(game_total,   mean, .before = 2, .complete = TRUE)),
    last3_oreb         = lag(slide_dbl(oreb,         mean, .before = 2, .complete = TRUE)),
    last3_fga          = lag(slide_dbl(fga,          mean, .before = 2, .complete = TRUE)),
    last3_x3pa         = lag(slide_dbl(x3pa,         mean, .before = 2, .complete = TRUE)),
    last3_fta          = lag(slide_dbl(fta,          mean, .before = 2, .complete = TRUE)),
    last3_tov          = lag(slide_dbl(tov,          mean, .before = 2, .complete = TRUE)),

    last5_pts              = lag(slide_dbl(team_points,        mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),
    last5_pts_allowed      = lag(slide_dbl(opp_points,         mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),
    last5_total            = lag(slide_dbl(game_total,         mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),
    last5_oreb             = lag(slide_dbl(oreb,               mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),
    last5_fga              = lag(slide_dbl(fga,                mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),
    last5_x3pa             = lag(slide_dbl(x3pa,               mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),
    last5_fta              = lag(slide_dbl(fta,                mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),
    last5_tov              = lag(slide_dbl(tov,                mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),
    last5_fg_pct           = lag(slide_dbl(fg_pct,             mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),
    last5_x3p_pct          = lag(slide_dbl(x3p_pct,           mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),
    last5_ft_pct           = lag(slide_dbl(ft_pct,            mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),
    last5_second_chance_pts= lag(slide_dbl(second_chance_pts,  mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),
    last5_paint_pts        = lag(slide_dbl(paint_pts,          mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),
    last5_fastbreak_pts    = lag(slide_dbl(fastbreak_pts,      mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),
    last5_bench_pts        = lag(slide_dbl(bench_pts,          mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),
    last5_plus_minus       = lag(slide_dbl(plus_minus,         mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),

    last10_pts         = lag(slide_dbl(team_points,  mean, .before = 9, .complete = TRUE)),
    last10_pts_allowed = lag(slide_dbl(opp_points,   mean, .before = 9, .complete = TRUE)),
    last10_total       = lag(slide_dbl(game_total,   mean, .before = 9, .complete = TRUE)),
    last10_oreb        = lag(slide_dbl(oreb,         mean, .before = 9, .complete = TRUE)),
    last10_tov         = lag(slide_dbl(tov,          mean, .before = 9, .complete = TRUE)),
    last10_fga         = lag(slide_dbl(fga,          mean, .before = 9, .complete = TRUE)),
    last10_x3pa        = lag(slide_dbl(x3pa,         mean, .before = 9, .complete = TRUE)),
    last10_fta         = lag(slide_dbl(fta,          mean, .before = 9, .complete = TRUE)),

    last5_total_sd     = lag(slide_dbl(game_total,   sd,   .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),
    last10_total_sd    = lag(slide_dbl(game_total,   sd,   .before = 9, .complete = TRUE)),

    over220_last10     = lag(slide_dbl(game_total, ~ mean(.x > 220), .before = 9, .complete = TRUE)),
    over230_last10     = lag(slide_dbl(game_total, ~ mean(.x > 230), .before = 9, .complete = TRUE)),
    over240_last10     = lag(slide_dbl(game_total, ~ mean(.x > 240), .before = 9, .complete = TRUE))
  ) |>
  ungroup()
```

## Location-specific rolling form

```{r}
team_home_rolls <- team_games |>
  filter(home == 1) |>
  group_by(teamId) |>
  arrange(game_datetime, .by_group = TRUE)|>
  mutate(
    loc_last5_pts          = lag(slide_dbl(teamScore,                    mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),
    loc_last5_pts_allowed  = lag(slide_dbl(opponentScore,                mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),
    loc_last5_total        = lag(slide_dbl(teamScore + opponentScore,    mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE))
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  transmute(
    gameId,
    teamId,
    home_only_last5_pts          = loc_last5_pts,
    home_only_last5_pts_allowed  = loc_last5_pts_allowed,
    home_only_last5_total        = loc_last5_total
  )

team_away_rolls <- team_games |>
  filter(home == 0)|>
  group_by(teamId) |>
  arrange(game_datetime, .by_group = TRUE) |>
  mutate(
    loc_last5_pts          = lag(slide_dbl(teamScore,                    mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),
    loc_last5_pts_allowed  = lag(slide_dbl(opponentScore,                mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE)),
    loc_last5_total        = lag(slide_dbl(teamScore + opponentScore,    mean, .before = 4, .complete = TRUE))
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  transmute(
    gameId,
    teamId,
    away_only_last5_pts          = loc_last5_pts,
    away_only_last5_pts_allowed  = loc_last5_pts_allowed,
    away_only_last5_total        = loc_last5_total
  )
```


## Split Into Home and Away Feature Tables

```{r}
home_features <- team_features |>
  filter(home == 1) |>
  left_join(team_home_rolls, by = c("gameId", "teamId")) |>
  transmute(
    gameId,
    home_team_id            = teamId,
    home_rest_days          = rest_days,
    home_back_to_back       = back_to_back,
    home_win_pct            = rolling_win_pct,

    home_last1_pts          = last1_pts,
    home_last1_pts_allowed  = last1_pts_allowed,
    home_last1_total        = last1_total,
    home_last1_oreb         = last1_oreb,

    home_last3_pts          = last3_pts,
    home_last3_pts_allowed  = last3_pts_allowed,
    home_last3_total        = last3_total,
    home_last3_oreb         = last3_oreb,
    home_last3_fga          = last3_fga,
    home_last3_x3pa         = last3_x3pa,
    home_last3_fta          = last3_fta,
    home_last3_tov          = last3_tov,

    home_last5_pts              = last5_pts,
    home_last5_pts_allowed      = last5_pts_allowed,
    home_last5_total            = last5_total,
    home_last5_oreb             = last5_oreb,
    home_last5_fga              = last5_fga,
    home_last5_x3pa             = last5_x3pa,
    home_last5_fta              = last5_fta,
    home_last5_tov              = last5_tov,
    home_last5_fg_pct           = last5_fg_pct,
    home_last5_x3p_pct          = last5_x3p_pct,
    home_last5_ft_pct           = last5_ft_pct,
    home_last5_second_chance_pts= last5_second_chance_pts,
    home_last5_paint_pts        = last5_paint_pts,
    home_last5_fastbreak_pts    = last5_fastbreak_pts,
    home_last5_bench_pts        = last5_bench_pts,
    home_last5_plus_minus       = last5_plus_minus,

    home_last10_pts         = last10_pts,
    home_last10_pts_allowed = last10_pts_allowed,
    home_last10_total       = last10_total,
    home_last10_oreb        = last10_oreb,
    home_last10_tov         = last10_tov,
    home_last10_fga         = last10_fga,
    home_last10_x3pa        = last10_x3pa,
    home_last10_fta         = last10_fta,

    home_last5_total_sd     = last5_total_sd,
    home_last10_total_sd    = last10_total_sd,
    home_over220_last10     = over220_last10,
    home_over230_last10     = over230_last10,
    home_over240_last10     = over240_last10,

    home_only_last5_pts,
    home_only_last5_pts_allowed,
    home_only_last5_total
  )

away_features <- team_features |>
  filter(home == 0) |>
  left_join(team_away_rolls, by = c("gameId", "teamId")) |>
  transmute(
    gameId,
    away_team_id            = teamId,
    away_rest_days          = rest_days,
    away_back_to_back       = back_to_back,
    away_win_pct            = rolling_win_pct,

    away_last1_pts          = last1_pts,
    away_last1_pts_allowed  = last1_pts_allowed,
    away_last1_total        = last1_total,
    away_last1_oreb         = last1_oreb,

    away_last3_pts          = last3_pts,
    away_last3_pts_allowed  = last3_pts_allowed,
    away_last3_total        = last3_total,
    away_last3_oreb         = last3_oreb,
    away_last3_fga          = last3_fga,
    away_last3_x3pa         = last3_x3pa,
    away_last3_fta          = last3_fta,
    away_last3_tov          = last3_tov,

    away_last5_pts              = last5_pts,
    away_last5_pts_allowed      = last5_pts_allowed,
    away_last5_total            = last5_total,
    away_last5_oreb             = last5_oreb,
    away_last5_fga              = last5_fga,
    away_last5_x3pa             = last5_x3pa,
    away_last5_fta              = last5_fta,
    away_last5_tov              = last5_tov,
    away_last5_fg_pct           = last5_fg_pct,
    away_last5_x3p_pct          = last5_x3p_pct,
    away_last5_ft_pct           = last5_ft_pct,
    away_last5_second_chance_pts= last5_second_chance_pts,
    away_last5_paint_pts        = last5_paint_pts,
    away_last5_fastbreak_pts    = last5_fastbreak_pts,
    away_last5_bench_pts        = last5_bench_pts,
    away_last5_plus_minus       = last5_plus_minus,

    away_last10_pts         = last10_pts,
    away_last10_pts_allowed = last10_pts_allowed,
    away_last10_total       = last10_total,
    away_last10_oreb        = last10_oreb,
    away_last10_tov         = last10_tov,
    away_last10_fga         = last10_fga,
    away_last10_x3pa        = last10_x3pa,
    away_last10_fta         = last10_fta,

    away_last5_total_sd     = last5_total_sd,
    away_last10_total_sd    = last10_total_sd,
    away_over220_last10     = over220_last10,
    away_over230_last10     = over230_last10,
    away_over240_last10     = over240_last10,

    away_only_last5_pts,
    away_only_last5_pts_allowed,
    away_only_last5_total
  )

cat("Rows in home_features:", nrow(home_features), "\n")
cat("Rows in away_features:", nrow(away_features), "\n")
```


## engineered vars
```{r}
model_data_total <- games_base |>
  left_join(true_oreb,     by = "gameId") |>
  left_join(home_features, by = "gameId") |>
  left_join(away_features, by = "gameId") |>
  mutate(
    rest_diff         = home_rest_days - away_rest_days,
    rest_diff_capped  = pmax(pmin(rest_diff, 5), -5),
    any_back_to_back  = if_else(home_back_to_back == 1 | away_back_to_back == 1, 1L, 0L),
    both_back_to_back = if_else(home_back_to_back == 1 & away_back_to_back == 1, 1L, 0L),

    blend_home_proj5  = (home_last5_pts + away_last5_pts_allowed) / 2,
    blend_away_proj5  = (away_last5_pts + home_last5_pts_allowed) / 2,
    blend_total_proj5 = blend_home_proj5 + blend_away_proj5,

    blend_home_proj10  = (home_last10_pts + away_last10_pts_allowed) / 2,
    blend_away_proj10  = (away_last10_pts + home_last10_pts_allowed) / 2,
    blend_total_proj10 = blend_home_proj10 + blend_away_proj10,

    blend_total_proj3 = ((home_last3_pts + away_last3_pts_allowed) +
                         (away_last3_pts + home_last3_pts_allowed)) / 2,

    recent_offense_sum5  = home_last5_pts + away_last5_pts,
    recent_defense_sum5  = home_last5_pts_allowed + away_last5_pts_allowed,
    recent_total_form5   = (home_last5_total + away_last5_total) / 2,
    recent_total_form10  = (home_last10_total + away_last10_total) / 2,
    recent_total_form3   = (home_last3_total  + away_last3_total)  / 2,

    pace_pressure5 = (
      home_last5_fga + 0.44 * home_last5_fta + home_last5_tov +
      away_last5_fga + 0.44 * away_last5_fta + away_last5_tov
    ) / 2,

    pace_pressure10 = (
      home_last10_fga + 0.44 * home_last10_fta + home_last10_tov +
      away_last10_fga + 0.44 * away_last10_fta + away_last10_tov
    ) / 2,

    three_point_env5 = (home_last5_x3pa * home_last5_x3p_pct) +
                       (away_last5_x3pa * away_last5_x3p_pct),

    free_throw_env5  = home_last5_fta + away_last5_fta,
    second_chance_env5 = home_last5_oreb + away_last5_oreb,
    shooting_env5      = home_last5_fg_pct + away_last5_fg_pct,

    location_total_env = (home_only_last5_total + away_only_last5_total) / 2,

    recent_total_volatility = (home_last5_total_sd + away_last5_total_sd) / 2,

    over220_env10 = (home_over220_last10 + away_over220_last10) / 2,
    over230_env10 = (home_over230_last10 + away_over230_last10) / 2,
    over240_env10 = (home_over240_last10 + away_over240_last10) / 2,

    tov_env5  = home_last5_tov + away_last5_tov,
    tov_env10 = home_last10_tov + away_last10_tov,

    is_playoff = if_else(gameType == "Playoffs", 1L, 0L)
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(total), !is.na(spread), !is.na(oreb))

cat("Rows in model_data_total:", nrow(model_data_total), "\n")
```



## Create dataset

```{r}
model_ready <- model_data_total |>
  filter(
    !is.na(home_last5_pts),       !is.na(away_last5_pts),
    !is.na(home_last5_pts_allowed),  !is.na(away_last5_pts_allowed),
    !is.na(home_last5_fga),       !is.na(away_last5_fga),
    !is.na(home_last5_fg_pct),    !is.na(away_last5_fg_pct)
  ) |>
    select(
    gameId, game_date, home_team, away_team, gameType,
    total,

    home_back_to_back, away_back_to_back,

    blend_total_proj5,blend_total_proj10, 

    rest_diff_capped,
    any_back_to_back,

    pace_pressure5,
    shooting_env5,
    three_point_env5,
    free_throw_env5,
    tov_env5,
    over230_env10,
    recent_total_volatility,
    is_playoff
  )

#this is not necessary
model_ready <- model_ready |> 
  filter(game_date >= as.Date("2013-10-01"))

cat("Rows in model_ready:", nrow(model_ready), "\n")
cat("Regular Season rows:", sum(model_ready$gameType == "Regular Season"), "\n")
cat("Playoff rows:", sum(model_ready$gameType == "Playoffs"), "\n")
```

---

## Save Outputs
```{r}
colnames(model_ready)
```


```{r}
write_csv(model_data_total, "TOTAL_BACKBONE_DATASET.csv")
write_csv(model_ready,      "TOTAL_MODEL_READY.csv")

cat("Backbone dataset saved:", nrow(model_data_total), "rows,",
    ncol(model_data_total), "columns\n")
cat("Model-ready dataset saved:", nrow(model_ready), "rows,",
    ncol(model_ready), "columns\n")
```


## Sanity Checks

```{r}
cat("Any non-positive totals:", sum(model_ready$total <= 0, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

cat("blend_total_proj5 range:",
    round(min(model_ready$blend_total_proj5, na.rm = TRUE), 1), "to",
    round(max(model_ready$blend_total_proj5, na.rm = TRUE), 1), "\n")

cat("Observed total range:",
    min(model_ready$total, na.rm = TRUE), "to",
    max(model_ready$total, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

key_features <- c("blend_total_proj5", "pace_pressure5",
                  "three_point_env5",   "over230_env10",
                  "tov_env5",           "shooting_env5")

cor_vals <- sapply(key_features, function(f) {
  cor(model_ready[[f]], model_ready$total, use = "complete.obs")
})

cat("\nCorrelations with total (model_ready):\n")
print(round(sort(cor_vals, decreasing = TRUE), 3))
```
